{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125229AC16071A6D078CD07726"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611293849552110361","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好听！情节紧凑，条理顺畅。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772153397,"group_id":"7585130144864406553","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3mXkGSoZLz2WPPgIFD/2e5AG9M1g31OjpgoknKUvYoO","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2634022242751604","user_name":"梧桐洋楼的罗华"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2634022242751604","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7585130144864406553","book_info":{"abstract":"【权谋➕宫斗➕党争➕言情➕皇上】他叫弘历，雍正皇帝第四子，二十五岁登基继位，在位六十年，是中国历史上执政时间最长，年寿最高的皇帝。
他胸怀大志，一生勤于政事，武功文治，推行宽宥政策，是他把大清朝推上了盛世巅峰，也是他把大清朝盛世落下帷幕。
他不仅有经世之才，也有书生之气。他的诗作颇丰，高达4万余首，几乎与全唐诗相当。
他一生风流倜傥，在坊间留下许多爱情佳话，成为人们茶余饭后的谈资。
——这个人就是乾隆皇帝。
小说把正史和野史糅合在一起，以文学的形式再现乾隆皇帝的传奇一生，故事精彩绝伦，非常好看。欢迎爱好历史的朋友阅读赐教。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b55cabd75eb064dcc8f38c821bdc4db6","author":"农家三姑","author_id":"","book_id":"7585130144864406553","book_name":"朕是弘历打造大清盛世","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#583008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7104人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585130502831489598","read_count":"7104","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"421539"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"194","tags":"历史古代,历史,清朝,皇帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/469bf316634f03d0efb8652b78b5dde7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252749&x-signature=kW4S0sp5kVIWYnIMqyV27m0ndSg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"55768613691","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125229AC16071A6D078CD07726"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4673,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8304,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":61},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1772158179,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"d 他胸怀大志，一生勤于政事，武功文治，推行宽宥政策，是他把大清朝推上了盛世巅峰，也是他把大清朝盛世落下帷幕。
